fmiModelDescription.description: Simple pendulum with one revolute joint and one body

ScalarVariable.name: rev.phi
ScalarVariable.description: Relative rotation angle from frame_a to frame_b

ScalarVariable.name: rev.w
ScalarVariable.description: First derivative of angle phi (relative angular velocity)

ScalarVariable.name: der(rev.phi)
ScalarVariable.description: der(Relative rotation angle from frame_a to frame_b)

ScalarVariable.name: der(rev.w)
ScalarVariable.description: der(First derivative of angle phi (relative angular velocity))

ScalarVariable.name: der(body.w_a[1])
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of frame_a resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: der(body.w_a[2])
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of frame_a resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: der(body.w_a[3])
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of frame_a resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: der(damper.phi_rel)
ScalarVariable.description: Relative rotation angle (= flange_b.phi - flange_a.phi)

ScalarVariable.name: der(damper.w_rel)
ScalarVariable.description: Relative angular velocity (= der(phi_rel))

ScalarVariable.name: body.a_0[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute acceleration of frame_a resolved in world frame (= der(v_0))

ScalarVariable.name: body.a_0[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute acceleration of frame_a resolved in world frame (= der(v_0))

ScalarVariable.name: body.a_0[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute acceleration of frame_a resolved in world frame (= der(v_0))

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.T[1,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.T[1,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.T[1,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.T[2,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.T[2,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.T[2,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.T[3,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.T[3,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.T[3,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.f[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.f[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.f[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.t[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.t[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.t[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.g_0[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Gravity acceleration resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.g_0[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Gravity acceleration resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.v_0[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute velocity of frame_a, resolved in world frame (= der(r_0))

ScalarVariable.name: body.v_0[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute velocity of frame_a, resolved in world frame (= der(r_0))

ScalarVariable.name: body.v_0[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute velocity of frame_a, resolved in world frame (= der(r_0))

ScalarVariable.name: body.w_a[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of frame_a resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.w_a[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of frame_a resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.w_a[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of frame_a resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.z_a[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular acceleration of frame_a resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.z_a[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular acceleration of frame_a resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.z_a[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular acceleration of frame_a resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: damper.a_rel
ScalarVariable.description: Relative angular acceleration (= der(w_rel))

ScalarVariable.name: damper.lossPower
ScalarVariable.description: Loss power leaving component via heatPort (> 0, if heat is flowing out of component)

ScalarVariable.name: damper.phi_rel
ScalarVariable.description: Relative rotation angle (= flange_b.phi - flange_a.phi)

ScalarVariable.name: damper.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Torque between flanges (= flange_b.tau)

ScalarVariable.name: damper.w_rel
ScalarVariable.description: Relative angular velocity (= der(phi_rel))

ScalarVariable.name: rev.a
ScalarVariable.description: Second derivative of angle phi (relative angular acceleration)

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.f[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.f[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.f[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.t[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.t[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.t[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.T[1,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.T[1,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.T[1,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.T[2,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.T[2,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.T[2,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.T[3,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.T[3,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.T[3,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.w[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.w[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.R.w[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.r_0[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.r_0[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.r_0[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.I[1,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I[1,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I[1,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I[2,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I[2,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I[2,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I[3,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I[3,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I[3,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I_11
ScalarVariable.description: Element (1,1) of inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I_21
ScalarVariable.description: Element (2,1) of inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I_22
ScalarVariable.description: Element (2,2) of inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I_31
ScalarVariable.description: Element (3,1) of inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I_32
ScalarVariable.description: Element (3,2) of inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.I_33
ScalarVariable.description: Element (3,3) of inertia tensor

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.T[1,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.T[1,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.T[1,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.T[2,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.T[2,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.T[2,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.T[3,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.T[3,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.T[3,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.w[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.w[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.R_start.w[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.angles_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Initial values of angles to rotate world frame around 'sequence_start' axes into frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.angles_start[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Initial values of angles to rotate world frame around 'sequence_start' axes into frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.angles_start[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Initial values of angles to rotate world frame around 'sequence_start' axes into frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.cylinderDiameter
ScalarVariable.description: Diameter of cylinder

ScalarVariable.name: body.g_0[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Gravity acceleration resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.m
ScalarVariable.description: Mass of rigid body

ScalarVariable.name: body.r_CM[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector from frame_a to center of mass, resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.r_CM[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector from frame_a to center of mass, resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.r_CM[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector from frame_a to center of mass, resolved in frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.specularCoefficient
ScalarVariable.description: Reflection of ambient light (= 0: light is completely absorbed)

ScalarVariable.name: body.sphereDiameter
ScalarVariable.description: Diameter of sphere

ScalarVariable.name: body.w_0_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Initial or guess values of angular velocity of frame_a resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.w_0_start[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Initial or guess values of angular velocity of frame_a resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.w_0_start[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Initial or guess values of angular velocity of frame_a resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.z_0_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Initial values of angular acceleration z_0 = der(w_0)

ScalarVariable.name: body.z_0_start[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Initial values of angular acceleration z_0 = der(w_0)

ScalarVariable.name: body.z_0_start[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Initial values of angular acceleration z_0 = der(w_0)

ScalarVariable.name: damper.d
ScalarVariable.description: Damping constant

ScalarVariable.name: damper.flange_a.phi
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute rotation angle of flange

ScalarVariable.name: damper.phi_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal value of phi_rel (used for scaling)

ScalarVariable.name: rev.cylinderDiameter
ScalarVariable.description: Diameter of cylinder representing the joint axis

ScalarVariable.name: rev.cylinderLength
ScalarVariable.description: Length of cylinder representing the joint axis

ScalarVariable.name: rev.n[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Axis of rotation resolved in frame_a (= same as in frame_b)

ScalarVariable.name: rev.n[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Axis of rotation resolved in frame_a (= same as in frame_b)

ScalarVariable.name: rev.n[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Axis of rotation resolved in frame_a (= same as in frame_b)

ScalarVariable.name: rev.specularCoefficient
ScalarVariable.description: Reflection of ambient light (= 0: light is completely absorbed)

ScalarVariable.name: rev.support.phi
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute rotation angle of flange

ScalarVariable.name: world.axisDiameter
ScalarVariable.description: Diameter of world axes arrows

ScalarVariable.name: world.axisLength
ScalarVariable.description: Length of world axes arrows

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultArrowDiameter
ScalarVariable.description: Default for arrow diameter (e.g., of forces, torques, sensors)

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultAxisLength
ScalarVariable.description: Default for length of a frame axis (but not world frame)

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultBodyDiameter
ScalarVariable.description: Default for diameter of sphere representing the center of mass of a body

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultForceLength
ScalarVariable.description: Default for the fixed length of a shape representing a force (e.g., damper)

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultForceWidth
ScalarVariable.description: Default for the fixed width of a shape representing a force (e.g., spring, bushing)

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultFrameDiameterFraction
ScalarVariable.description: Default for arrow diameter of a coordinate system as a fraction of axis length

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultJointLength
ScalarVariable.description: Default for the fixed length of a shape representing a joint

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultJointWidth
ScalarVariable.description: Default for the fixed width of a shape representing a joint

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultN_to_m
ScalarVariable.description: Default scaling of force arrows (length = force/defaultN_to_m)

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultNm_to_m
ScalarVariable.description: Default scaling of torque arrows (length = torque/defaultNm_to_m)

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultSpecularCoefficient
ScalarVariable.description: Default reflection of ambient light (= 0: light is completely absorbed)

ScalarVariable.name: world.defaultWidthFraction
ScalarVariable.description: Default for shape width as a fraction of shape length (e.g., for Parts.FixedTranslation)

ScalarVariable.name: world.g
ScalarVariable.description: Constant gravity acceleration

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravityArrowDiameter
ScalarVariable.description: Diameter of gravity arrow

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravityArrowLength
ScalarVariable.description: Length of gravity arrow

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravityArrowTail[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from origin of world frame to arrow tail, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravityArrowTail[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from origin of world frame to arrow tail, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravityArrowTail[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from origin of world frame to arrow tail, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravitySphereDiameter
ScalarVariable.description: Diameter of sphere representing gravity center (default = mean diameter of earth)

ScalarVariable.name: world.groundAxis_u[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector along 1st axis (called u) of ground plane, resolved in world frame (should be perpendicular to gravity direction)

ScalarVariable.name: world.groundAxis_u[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector along 1st axis (called u) of ground plane, resolved in world frame (should be perpendicular to gravity direction)

ScalarVariable.name: world.groundAxis_u[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Vector along 1st axis (called u) of ground plane, resolved in world frame (should be perpendicular to gravity direction)

ScalarVariable.name: world.groundLength_u
ScalarVariable.description: Length of ground plane along groundAxis_u

ScalarVariable.name: world.groundLength_v
ScalarVariable.description: Length of ground plane perpendicular to groundAxis_u

ScalarVariable.name: world.mu
ScalarVariable.description: Gravity field constant (default = field constant of earth)

ScalarVariable.name: world.n[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Direction of gravity resolved in world frame (gravity = g*n/length(n))

ScalarVariable.name: world.n[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Direction of gravity resolved in world frame (gravity = g*n/length(n))

ScalarVariable.name: world.n[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Direction of gravity resolved in world frame (gravity = g*n/length(n))

ScalarVariable.name: world.nominalLength
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal length of multi-body system

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.w[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.w[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.R.w[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.r_0[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.r_0[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.frame_a.r_0[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.r_0[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from origin of world frame to origin of frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.r_0[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from origin of world frame to origin of frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: body.r_0[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from origin of world frame to origin of frame_a

ScalarVariable.name: damper.flange_a.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Cut torque in the flange

ScalarVariable.name: damper.flange_b.phi
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute rotation angle of flange

ScalarVariable.name: damper.flange_b.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Cut torque in the flange

ScalarVariable.name: rev.angle
ScalarVariable.description: = phi

ScalarVariable.name: rev.axis.phi
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute rotation angle of flange

ScalarVariable.name: rev.axis.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Cut torque in the flange

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.T[1,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.T[1,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.T[1,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.T[2,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.T[2,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.T[2,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.T[3,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.T[3,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.T[3,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.w[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.w[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.R.w[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.r_0[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.r_0[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_a.r_0[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.T[1,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.T[1,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.T[1,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.T[2,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.T[2,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.T[2,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.T[3,1]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.T[3,2]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.T[3,3]
ScalarVariable.description: Transformation matrix from world frame to local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.w[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.w[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.R.w[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Absolute angular velocity of local frame, resolved in local frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.f[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.f[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.f[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.r_0[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.r_0[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.r_0[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Position vector from world frame to the connector frame origin, resolved in world frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.t[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.t[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.frame_b.t[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: rev.support.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Cut torque in the flange

ScalarVariable.name: rev.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Driving torque in direction of axis of rotation

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.f[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.f[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.f[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-force resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.t[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.t[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: world.frame_b.t[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Cut-torque resolved in connector frame

ScalarVariable.name: body.sphereColor[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of sphere

ScalarVariable.name: body.sphereColor[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of sphere

ScalarVariable.name: body.sphereColor[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of sphere

ScalarVariable.name: rev.cylinderColor[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of cylinder representing the joint axis

ScalarVariable.name: rev.cylinderColor[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of cylinder representing the joint axis

ScalarVariable.name: rev.cylinderColor[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of cylinder representing the joint axis

ScalarVariable.name: world.axisColor_x[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of x-arrow

ScalarVariable.name: world.axisColor_x[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of x-arrow

ScalarVariable.name: world.axisColor_x[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of x-arrow

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravityArrowColor[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of gravity arrow

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravityArrowColor[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of gravity arrow

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravityArrowColor[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of gravity arrow

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravitySphereColor[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of gravity sphere

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravitySphereColor[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of gravity sphere

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravitySphereColor[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of gravity sphere

ScalarVariable.name: world.groundColor[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of ground plane

ScalarVariable.name: world.groundColor[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of ground plane

ScalarVariable.name: world.groundColor[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of ground plane

ScalarVariable.name: body.sequence_angleStates[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Sequence of rotations to rotate world frame into frame_a around the 3 angles used as potential states

ScalarVariable.name: body.sequence_angleStates[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Sequence of rotations to rotate world frame into frame_a around the 3 angles used as potential states

ScalarVariable.name: body.sequence_angleStates[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Sequence of rotations to rotate world frame into frame_a around the 3 angles used as potential states

ScalarVariable.name: body.sequence_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Sequence of rotations to rotate world frame into frame_a at initial time

ScalarVariable.name: body.sequence_start[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Sequence of rotations to rotate world frame into frame_a at initial time

ScalarVariable.name: body.sequence_start[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Sequence of rotations to rotate world frame into frame_a at initial time

ScalarVariable.name: damper.stateSelect
ScalarVariable.description: Priority to use phi_rel and w_rel as states

ScalarVariable.name: rev.stateSelect
ScalarVariable.description: Priority to use joint angle phi and w=der(phi) as states

ScalarVariable.name: world.gravityType
ScalarVariable.description: Type of gravity field

ScalarVariable.name: body.cylinderColor[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of cylinder

ScalarVariable.name: body.cylinderColor[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of cylinder

ScalarVariable.name: body.cylinderColor[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of cylinder

ScalarVariable.name: world.axisColor_z[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of z-arrow

ScalarVariable.name: world.axisColor_z[2]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of z-arrow

ScalarVariable.name: world.axisColor_z[3]
ScalarVariable.description: Color of z-arrow

ScalarVariable.name: body.angles_fixed
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if angles_start are used as initial values, else as guess values

ScalarVariable.name: body.animation
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if animation shall be enabled (show cylinder and sphere)

ScalarVariable.name: body.enforceStates
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if absolute variables of body object shall be used as states (StateSelect.always)

ScalarVariable.name: body.useQuaternions
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if quaternions shall be used as potential states otherwise use 3 angles as potential states

ScalarVariable.name: body.w_0_fixed
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if w_0_start are used as initial values, else as guess values

ScalarVariable.name: body.z_0_fixed
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if z_0_start are used as initial values, else as guess values

ScalarVariable.name: damper.useHeatPort
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if heatPort is enabled

ScalarVariable.name: rev.animation
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if animation shall be enabled (show axis as cylinder)

ScalarVariable.name: rev.useAxisFlange
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if axis flange is enabled

ScalarVariable.name: world.animateGravity
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if gravity field shall be visualized (acceleration vector or field center)

ScalarVariable.name: world.animateGround
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if ground plane shall be visualized

ScalarVariable.name: world.animateWorld
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if world coordinate system shall be visualized

ScalarVariable.name: world.axisShowLabels
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if labels shall be shown

ScalarVariable.name: world.driveTrainMechanics3D
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if 3-dim. mechanical effects of Parts.Mounting1D/Rotor1D/BevelGear1D shall be taken into account

ScalarVariable.name: world.enableAnimation
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if animation of all components is enabled

ScalarVariable.name: world.label1
ScalarVariable.description: Label of horizontal axis in icon

ScalarVariable.name: world.label2
ScalarVariable.description: Label of vertical axis in icon

Unknown.dependenciesKind: dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent dependent
